name: frozen stream bed
identity: A frozen stream bed located in an arctic environment, partially covered by ice and serving as a habitat for resilient plant life.
current_status: Serves as a foraging site where the player harvests fireweed and arctic dock, symbolizing the tribe's adaptation and the player's growing family.

appearance.value: Frozen stream bed with a thin layer of ice covering the surface, surrounded by arctic terrain.

location.value: Arctic environment, snow-dusted terrain with exposed patches.

usage.value: source of water for the community

volatile_state.location: Frozen stream bed in an arctic environment
volatile_state.condition: Frozen and partially covered by ice
volatile_state.current_activity: Player forages fireweed and arctic dock, monitoring plant growth with a protective maternal instinct
